leaks.name: Subscription Creep
leaks.tip: Too many subscriptions overlap in content. Audit and cancel unused ones.

leaks.name: Impulse Shopping
leaks.tip: Apply a 48-hour rule before any purchase over ₹500.

leaks.name: Transport Waste
leaks.tip: Consider monthly passes or carpooling to reduce per-trip costs.

leaks.name: Utility Overspend
leaks.tip: Check for vampire appliances and consider a lower mobile plan tier.

health.verdict: Critical — money is flowing out fast

recommendations.title: Subscription Audit Sprint
recommendations.desc: Cancel anything unused for 30+ days. Merge overlapping services.

recommendations.title: 48-Hour Purchase Rule
recommendations.desc: Add to cart, wait 48 hours. 60% of impulse items get abandoned naturally.

recommendations.title: Transport Optimisation
recommendations.desc: Evaluate monthly pass vs per-ride. Batch errands to cut individual trips.

recommendations.title: Zero-Based Budget Review
recommendations.desc: Assign every rupee a job at month start. Reduces spending by ~15% in month one.

recommendations.title: Automate Savings First
recommendations.desc: Auto-transfer 20% of income to savings the moment salary arrives.
